title: Validate 'Loss Aversion' pop-up's primary action to keep the trial
description: Test that clicking 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' on the Loss Aversion pop-up successfully aborts the cancel/pause flow and enables the reminder.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner.

steps.description: 2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, observe the headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.'
3. Click the primary, high-prominence button 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder'.

expected_result: The pop-up closes, the user remains in the Trial Corner, and the trial remains active. The 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle is automatically enabled.
